prompt: Ultra-realistic smartphone selfie, looks genuinely captured with a mobile phone, not a DSLR or AI render. A beautiful young East Asian woman with fair porcelain skin, large brown eyes, natural Korean makeup with soft peach blush and glossy pink lips, long black hair tied in a loose high ponytail with soft face-framing bangs. Wearing a fitted light gray zip-up athletic jacket over a white sports tank top. She is outdoors on a quiet tree-lined park pathway during a bright sunny afternoon. Holding the smartphone with one hand while the other hand is raised behind her head, casually adjusting her ponytail. Relaxed smile, looking directly into the phone camera. Warm natural sunlight creates soft highlights on her face and realistic shadows from the surrounding trees. Cobblestone walking path, green grass, leafy trees, and a peaceful park atmosphere in the background. Slight handheld framing, authentic front-camera perspective, natural phone HDR, realistic skin texture, fine hair strands, subtle digital noise, casual candid lifestyle aesthetic, Instagram-style selfie, high detail, photorealistic, looks like an unedited iPhone/mobile camera photo, no studio lighting, no watermark, no text, no logos, no AI-generated look.

promptZh: 超逼真手机自拍，看起来像是用手机真实拍摄的，而非单反相机或 AI 渲染。一位美丽的年轻 东亚 女性，拥有 白皙瓷肌，大大的棕色眼睛，自然的 韩系妆容，配以柔和的蜜桃色腮红和水润的粉色嘴唇，黑色长发扎成随性的高马尾，留有修饰脸型的柔和刘海。身穿一件修身的浅灰色拉链运动外套，内搭白色运动背心。她正身处阳光明媚的午后，在安静的林荫公园小径上。一只手拿着手机，另一只手抬起放在脑后，随性地整理着马尾。表情轻松微笑，直视手机镜头。温暖的自然阳光在她的脸上投下柔和的高光，周围树木投下逼真的阴影。背景是鹅卵石步道、绿草地、茂密的树木和宁静的公园氛围。轻微的手持构图，真实的手机前置摄像头视角，自然的手机 HDR，逼真的皮肤纹理，细致的发丝，轻微的数字噪点，随性的生活照美学，Instagram 风格自拍，高细节，照片级真实，看起来像未修图的 iPhone/手机照片，无影棚灯光，无水印，无文字，无 Logo，无 AI 生成感。
